entity.summary: Open-source decentralized exchange on Hedera supporting swaps across ERC-20, Hedera Token Service, and HBAR assets through automated market-maker liquidity pools and related liquidity and yield features.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation identifies HeliSwap as an open-source DEX for the Hedera ecosystem and documents token swaps, AMM liquidity pools, LP rewards, and yield farming. The official application remains reachable.

evidence.title: About HeliSwap
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies HeliSwap as an open-source decentralized exchange supporting Hedera ecosystem tokens and describes the protocol's DEX identity.

evidence.title: HeliSwap Features
evidence.notes: First-party feature documentation describes token swaps across ERC-20, HTS, and HBAR assets, AMM liquidity pools, LP rewards, and yield farms.

evidence.title: HeliSwap official application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application endpoint remains reachable as the HeliSwap exchange interface.
